name: Honey Cookies (Melomakarona)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 175°C.
2. In a large bowl, cream together butter and caster sugar until light and fluffy.
3. Add maize or peanut oil and mix well.
4. Grate the orange rind into the mixture and stir until combined.
5. In a separate bowl, sift plain flour and baking powder.
6. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture, mixing gently until just combined.
7. Stir in orange juice.
8. Shape the dough into small balls and place on a greased baking sheet.
9. Bake for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown.
10. Allow cookies to cool completely before serving.
